title: 菊花賞の後に・自分のレース

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature impresses the spectators with a
strong performance. She vows to become even
better before Tokai Teio returns.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home, I give her a handmade origami
trophy for successfully making the race her own.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I also decide that she is ready for the Arima Kinen
and suggest that she try running it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To repay her fans for their support, Nice Nature
agrees with my suggestion and enters the Arima
Kinen, deciding our next goal!
